publishedAbstract: ReclaimSpaceJob is constantly failing and causes `csi-addons-controller-manager` pod to enter crashloopbackoff. **Deriving Documentation:** Methods regarding different Reclaim Space Job configurations can be found in the [Reclaiming Space on Target Volumes](https://docs.redhat.com/en/documentation/red_hat_openshift_data_foundation/4.16/html/managing_and_allocating_storage_resources/reclaiming-space-on-target-volumes_rhodf) product documentation and cover the following:- Enabling reclaim space operations on PersistentVolumeClaims using the Annotation method (Recommended).- Enabling reclaim space operation using ReclaimSpaceJob.- Enabling reclaim space operation using ReclaimSpaceCronJob. **Related Articles:** [Pod csi-addons-controller-manager OOMKilled- OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF)](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/7002548) [ceph-csi-controller-manager Pod has High Restarts and/or is Stuck in CrashLoopBackOff](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/7099814)
publishedTitle: ReclaimSpaceJob is constantly failing and causes csi-addons-controller-manager pod to enter crashloopbackoff
